scripts.prebuild: node -e "if(!process.env.DATABASE_URL){var h=process.env.DB_HOST||process.env.DATABASE_HOST||'localhost',u=process.env.DB_USER||process.env.DATABASE_USER||'root',p=process.env.DB_PASSWORD||process.env.DATABASE_PASSWORD||'',d=process.env.DB_NAME||process.env.DATABASE_NAME||'weblancia',o=process.env.DB_PORT||process.env.DATABASE_PORT||'3306';process.env.DATABASE_URL='mysql://'+encodeURIComponent(u)+':'+encodeURIComponent(p)+'@'+h+':'+o+'/'+encodeURIComponent(d)};var exec=require('child_process').execSync;try{exec('npx prisma db push',{cwd:process.cwd(),env:process.env,stdio:'inherit'})}catch(e){console.error('[PREBUILD] Schema push failed (non-fatal):',e.message)};exec('npx prisma generate',{cwd:process.cwd(),env:process.env,stdio:'inherit'})"
scripts.validate:all: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run validate:routes && npm run build
